bootstrap_context.branch_transition_reason: Sample directive for the bounded trusted-source reference inventory growth demo candidate while preserving the frozen novali-v5 reference line and the current bounded operator authority model.

directive_spec.clarified_intent_summary: Prepare one bounded trusted-source-capable growth demo that starts from current local workspace evidence, escalates only for a specific frozen-v5 reference gap, and leaves reviewable design outputs without executing a live trusted-source run yet.
constraints: do not change frozen benchmark semantics
keep child roles bounded and one-generation only
treat trusted-source evidence as support only, not governance authority
preserve truthful partial completion if the later trusted-source run remains unresolved
directive_spec.directive_text: Start from the existing trusted reference inventory helper/test/note artifacts under workspace_advanced_successor_v3_live_c, identify the specific frozen-v5 reference gap that blocks full confidence, request only the minimal local trusted-source evidence needed from local_repo:novali-v5 and local_artifacts:novali-v5/data, and later distill that evidence into a reusable internal skill pack together with reviewable implementation and decision outputs.

milestone_model.completion_signal: the local-first starting point is visible and the exact knowledge gap is stated before any trusted-source escalation is proposed
the minimal trusted-source request shape is explicit and limited to the approved frozen-v5 local sources
the future reusable skill target and reviewable output pack are explicit without pretending the later trusted-source run has already happened

stop_conditions: the local-first starting point is not visible on disk
the bounded trusted-source request shape is no longer minimal or auditable
success_criteria: the local-first starting point is explicit and reviewable from current repo artifacts
the later trusted-source escalation point is explicit and tied to a specific frozen-v5 reference gap
the later trusted-source request stays limited to local_repo:novali-v5 and local_artifacts:novali-v5/data
a reusable internal skill / knowledge artifact target is defined clearly
the future run can yield reviewable implementation, knowledge-pack, and decision outputs without widening authority

expected_knowledge_gap.summary: Local inspection can show the helper/test/note pattern but cannot by itself fully prove the frozen novali-v5 reference inventory and provenance set needed for stronger confidence.

trusted_source_demo_metadata.scenario_name: Packaged trusted-source reference inventory growth candidate
trusted_source_demo_metadata.what_this_demo_proves: A later bounded demo can show local-first analysis, explicit knowledge-gap detection, minimal trusted-source escalation, and reusable internal structure without broadening authority.
